title: [FIRRTL] GCSM: Add statistics
body:
Add some statistics to the SignalMapping pass:

* Number of buffer wire pairs added (usually same as above, but can be more if forced input ports are instantiated at multiple locations), interesting because these are normally unnecessary modifications to the design (and optimization blockers) we insert as a result of using signal mapping.
* Number of input, output ports forced
* Number of sources, sinks
* Number of modules with at least one source or sink.
